objective: The observed binary selected the baseline sha256_block_data_order_riscv64 path, but current OpenSSL already has RISC-V SHA-256 Zbb and vector runtime dispatch; the safe Agent4 action is to document SHA-2 capability override diagnostics instead of changing generic RISC-V build flags.

changes.rationale: The observed binary selected the baseline sha256_block_data_order_riscv64 path, but current OpenSSL already has RISC-V SHA-256 Zbb and vector runtime dispatch; the safe Agent4 action is to document SHA-2 capability override diagnostics instead of changing generic RISC-V build flags.
instructions: 添加最小的、保持行为不变的文档说明，展示 RISC-V SHA-2 capability override 诊断用法。
明确 OPENSSL_riscvcap 影响 runtime-dispatched implementations，不改变 compiler-selected architecture flags 或 linux64-riscv64 默认 target baseline。
明确普通 Linux 执行应优先使用 hwprobe-detected capabilities。
避免无关重构和格式噪音。

expectedDiffSummary: 候选补丁应只修改 doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod，记录 RISC-V SHA-2 override 诊断示例和默认 target baseline 边界。
